customer_id: Unique identifier for customers. Primary key for identifying customers across tables. Use for customer-level analysis.
location_id: Location level key identifier for a customer. Represents a specific business location within the system.
npa: Net Profit Added. The first year net profit prediction after bottom of funnel (first revenue generating). Mostly used for marketing analyses and cohort evaluation.
active_customer: A customer who has processed at least one transaction with positive volume in a given time period (typically last 30 days or 90 days).
gpv: Gross Processing Volume - The total dollar amount of payments processed. Use aggregate tables and NET_GPV fields to appropriately query. Excludes refunds and chargebacks.
pos: Point of Sale - Hardware and software for accepting payments. Can refer to register devices, terminals, or physical hardware.
audience_predicted: High-level customer vertical classification: food_and_beverage, health_and_beauty, retail, services_others. Primary segmentation field.
vertical: Business industry or category. Typically use audience_predicted or sub_audience_predicted fields for analysis.
cohort: Group of customers who signed up or reached a milestone during the same time period. Used for retention and performance analysis.
report_date: Date dimension for aggregated metrics. Use for time-based filtering and grouping. Standard field in aggregate tables.
product_name: Name of product. Found in DIM_PRODUCT table.
product_category: High-level product grouping: Processing, SaaS, Hardware, Banking. Use for product portfolio analysis.
customer_segment: Volume-based segmentation: Inactive, Micro, SMB, Mid-Market, Enterprise. Used for customer sizing.
adjusted_revenue: Revenue adjusted for accounting purposes. Use for financial reporting.
transaction_count: Number of payment transactions. Use for transaction volume analysis and average ticket size calculations.
net_gpv: Gross Processing Volume minus refunds. Use NET_GPV columns in aggregate tables for accurate processing volume calculations.
country_code: Country code for customer's primary location. Common values: US, GB, CA, AU, JP, FR, ES, IE.
test_users: Internal test accounts and users. Exclude using your test user dimension table. Filter: is_test_account = FALSE.
attach_rate: Percentage of customers using a specific product. Calculated as (customers with product / total customers). Key product adoption metric.
